sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109489" key="u(pofhtei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφητ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an expounding of present</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">past events,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προφητεία,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
